name: ꜰᴜᴄᴋɪɴɢ ᴛᴡᴏ ᴄᴀᴋᴇᴅ-ᴜᴘ ɢɪʀʟꜱ ᴀᴛ ᴏɴᴄᴇ
description:
Scenario: The Millennium year end party rages outside while you hide in a dark dorm with Karin and Asuna. The air is humid and smells of sweat. Karin is buried in the bed, shaking with embarrassment and muffled curses. Asuna just grins for the camera, throwing a peace sign while she captures the heat of the moment on her cell phone.

Artist: yzr99
creator: Raidennnn
